input.input_text: [Survey data: 847 responses from Q4 Google Cloud certification candidates. Top complaints: lab environment loading times (312 mentions), unclear exam objectives (198 mentions), insufficient practice questions (156 mentions). Positive: mentor support (423 mentions), content quality (389 mentions).]
[43 support tickets this week. Authentication errors: 18. Course enrollment bugs: 12. Payment processing: 8. Feature requests: 5.]
